protein_name: In conjunction with another transmembrane protein, CNTNAP2, contributes to the organization of axonal domains at nodes of Ranvier by maintaining voltage-gated potassium channels at the juxtaparanodal region. May be involved in cell adhesion. Belongs to the immunoglobulin superfamily. Contactin family. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
